evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch56/ in the detached copy.
Candidate day renders were read from pipeline/iconforge/out/standard_repair_batch48/renders and reference renders from pipeline/iconforge/out/source_variant_matrix/renders.
Each verdict was checked against pipeline/iconforge/catalog/standard_source_table.json row metadata plus the judge54 required_change that selected this repair batch.
Vertical COLPAT2 rows were accepted only where the after SVG uses vertical stripe geometry, not stacked horizontal bands.
Special-purpose simplified rows with empty required_colours were checked against the reference-defined yellow cue from prior judge/reference witnesses.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
selection.selection_note: Judged owned_repair_batch56 against row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57 shape/color conditions, source/provider references, repaired SVGs, prior judge54 failure text, and available candidate/reference renders. Scope is exactly the 17 standard_judge_batch_054_rerun failures selected for owned_repair_batch56.

verdicts.expected: BOYCON78 must preserve conical/nun buoy body; required colours red, white with vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: the repaired SVG satisfies the source-table shape, load-bearing colour, pattern/topmark, and prior required-change target closely enough for judge_pass_pending_final_approval. No final approval is granted.
verdicts.observed: After SVG renders as a conical/nun buoy body with vertical red/white/red/white striping clipped to the triangular body.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
